scripts.build:github: npm run assets:mobile && npm run build
scripts.package:pwa: npm run assets:mobile && npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-pwa.ps1
scripts.package:pwa:publish: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-pwa.ps1
scripts.android:sync: npm run package:pwa && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
